title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.9.2 - Crying Out Loud reverted to 'Whenever a debuff of yours clears, gain 3(4) Vigor' — the buff-clear version fed Vigor back into itself too strongly. Requires BaseLib.
